data.title: brainstorm: shows epic selection list when user provides feature description as argument
data.description: When /dso:brainstorm is invoked with a feature description as the argument (e.g., /dso:brainstorm We need to create a stronger distinction...), the skill incorrectly displays the full list of existing 0-child epics and asks the user to choose. It should detect that a feature description was provided (not a ticket ID) and immediately begin the Socratic dialogue with that description as seeding context.
